zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Ramsden於1533年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾利德斯時，她的父親John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall22歲，母親Mary Matilda Tattersall13歲。她於1562年與Henry Rice Wade在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾哈利法可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和10個女兒的父母。她去世於1600年7月在英國越可爾哈利法可享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾哈利法可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Ramsden于1533年出生在英国英格兰越可爾利德斯时，她的父亲John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall22岁，母亲Mary Matilda Tattersall13岁。她于1562年与Henry Rice Wade在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾哈利法可结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和10个女儿的父母。她去世于1600年7月在英国越可爾哈利法可享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾哈利法可。

nameMeanings.name: Ramsden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Ramsden in Cartworth, near Holmfirth (Yorkshire), recorded as Rommesdene in 1315 and Ramesdene in 1323. The placename derives from Old English ramm ‘ram’ (genitive rammes) or hramsa ‘wild garlic’ + denu ‘valley’.

habitational name from Ramsden in Benenden (Kent). The placename probably derives from Old English ramm ‘ram’ (genitive rammes), or perhaps an Old English personal name Ramm (genitive Rammes), + Old English denn ‘pasture’.

variants.name: Ramson
meanings: habitational name, either from Ramshorn in Bickington (Devon) or from Rampisham (Dorset).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Ramsden was born in 1533, in Leeds, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall, was 22 and her mother, Mary Matilda Tattersall, was 13. She married Henry Rice Wade in 1562, in Halifax, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 10 daughters. She died in July 1600, in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Halifax, West Riding of Yorkshire, Engla: Halifax St James, Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Ramsden est née en 1533, à Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mary Matilda Tattersall, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Rice Wade en 1562, à Halifax, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 10 filles. Elle est décédée en juillet 1600, à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Ramsden 1533 in Leeds, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall 22 und ihre Mutter Mary Matilda Tattersall 13. Sie hat 1562 in Halifax, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Henry Rice Wade geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Sie starb im Juli 1600 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Halifax, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ramsdenが1533年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアリーズで生まれた時，父John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hallは22歳，母Mary Matilda Tattersallは13歳であった。1562年にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアハリファックスでHenry Rice Wadeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼女は1600年7月にイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスにて埋葬された。

ko.Halifax, West Riding of Yorkshire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스 할이파스 스트 자메스
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ramsden(이)가 1533년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Matilda Tattersall(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1562년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 할이파스에서 Henry Rice Wade(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1600년 7월 영국 요르크실르 할이파스에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Henry Rice Wade em 1562, em Halifax, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 10 filhas. ru.Halifax, West Riding of Yorkshire, Engla: хэлифакс ст джемесь, хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Ramsden родилась в 1533 г. в местности лидс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Matilda Tattersall, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Rice Wade в 1562 г. в местности хэлифакс, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 10 дочерей. Она умерла июль 1600 г. в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Ramsden nació en 1533, en Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mary Matilda Tattersall, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Henry Rice Wade en 1562, en Halifax, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 10 hijas. Murió en julio de 1600, en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
